opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: BNG has no booking button, no contact form, and is phone-only contact.
opportunities.observation: Boise HVAC customers calling after hours are booking competitors with online scheduling.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI-powered 24/7 booking widget to capture after-hours HVAC service requests instantly.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: No email marketing tools detected and no recurring revenue signals on site.
opportunities.observation: BNG's 421-review customer base receives zero seasonal tune-up reminders, leaving revenue on the table.
opportunities.fix: Automate spring cooling and fall heating reminder campaigns to existing Boise-area customers.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected; business relies entirely on phone-only contact.
opportunities.observation: Every unbooked or missed call from Boise homeowners is lost with no follow-up possible.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call capture and CRM logging to auto-tag, store, and follow up every inbound lead.
